humanSummary: Role Report: TASK-TEAM-0083 — KnowledgeScout Status: UNABLE TO EXECUTE Constraint Analysis - Authority: KnowledgeScout operates as a subordinate role and cannot perform execution tasks, invoke task runners, or assume Coordinator authority. - System Access: No direct access to task management systems or role-coordinator functions. - Governance Context: Prior governed roles (Reader, Implementer, Validator, Lieutenant, EvidenceCollector) also report inability to execute under current auth.
